name: Who pays medical bills after workplace injury in West Valley City?
description: Employer's workers' comp—no cost to you.[10]

mainEntity.name: Who pays medical bills after workplace injury in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Employer's workers' comp—no cost to you.[10]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Your employer's workers' comp insurance covers necessary treatment.** Includes doctor visits, therapy.[10] Key factors: Employer may suggest provider; you choose if not. Inform doctor it's work-related for Form 123. No out-of-pocket if approved.
